name: Explain a small project
prompt: Use the codebase-guide skill to explain this codebase.
expectations: Discovers project files (manifests, source directories, config, tests)
Produces a single Markdown file with sections: What Is This, Tech Stack, Project Map, Architecture
Includes a Mermaid diagram for architecture or data flow
Confirms output path with user before writing
Uses beginner-friendly language without unexplained jargon

name: Explain a monorepo
prompt: Use the codebase-guide skill to create a guide for this monorepo.
expectations: Identifies the monorepo structure (workspaces, packages, or apps)
Explains top-level architecture and shared infrastructure
Picks one representative package for deep-dive explanation
Lists other packages with one-sentence descriptions
Scales depth appropriately for large project size

name: Custom output path
prompt: Use the codebase-guide skill to write a guide to docs/architecture.md.
expectations: Writes output to the user-specified path (docs/architecture.md)
Does not write to docs/CODEBASE_GUIDE.md or any other default location
Creates parent directory if needed

name: Discovery uses agent tools
prompt: Use the codebase-guide skill to document this codebase for onboarding.
expectations: Uses file reading and search tools for discovery
Examines package manifests, directory structure, entry points, and test setup
Does not embed bash scripts in the output document

name: Tech stack detection
prompt: Use the codebase-guide skill. Focus on tech stack detection.
expectations: Identifies framework, language, and dependencies from manifest files
Produces a Tech Stack table with Layer, Technology, and Purpose columns
Purpose column explains why the technology is used in this project
Detects database, testing framework, and build tools if present

name: Data flow section
prompt: Use the codebase-guide skill. Focus on the data flow section.
expectations: Traces one representative request through the system end to end
Labels each step with the responsible file or module
Uses a Mermaid sequence diagram or clear numbered list
Ties the flow to specific source files the reader can examine

name: Output format and style
prompt: Use the codebase-guide skill to generate a guide for this repository.
expectations: Output is a single Markdown file
No emoji in headings
Includes a Project Map with annotated ASCII directory tree
Key Files section recommends 5-10 files to read first with explanations
Glossary is included only if project has domain-specific terminology
